## What this adds

<!-- One line: the skill or prompt, and the job it does. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Complete**: usable end to end as submitted.
- [ ] **Self-contained**: nothing outside the entry is needed to use it.
- [ ] **Honest**: claims match what it does, and limits are stated.
- [ ] **Distinct**: it covers a job no existing entry covers.
- [ ] **Portable**: plain markdown and YAML, no tool-specific syntax in the body.
- [ ] Frontmatter `name` matches the folder or file name.
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/build-index.mjs` and it passes.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full bar.
